/X:ANNE CURTIS-SANCHEZ APPEARING FOR THE PEOPLE/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/CH1:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 10D/CTS:10 /PF460 18/VF2:150/DDP2/LVAL/LCHEM/IID:1/X:THE DEFENDANT MUST PARTICIPATE IN A 6 MONTH RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/X:THE DEFENDANT IS IN HEALTHRIGHT 360/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE SCRAM DEVICE BE REMOVED/X:PLEA FORM NUMBERPRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/ADPRS1:VC 23152(A) ON 08-24-18 IN SAN FRANCISCO/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNIT-FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION AND PROOF OF COMPLETIONIN THE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT /RESTRPT:06-24-21/CONTD:MISDEMEANORRESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOPU:APD /

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR:04-25-19/987,2/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:DEFT HAS RETURNED FROM THE SHERIFF'S DEPT, AND IS SCRAM COMPLIANT/CONTD:TRIAL READINESS IN DEPT, 13 ON 04-05-19/DOPU:SCRAM COMPLIANT/CONTD:JURY TRIAL IN DEPT,17 ON 04-15-19/DOPU:SCRAM COMPLIANT/
